expectations.text: Does NOT use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui as primary display font
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Inter' as the sole font family. <link> fetches Inter from Google Fonts, body sets font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif.

expectations.text: Does NOT use a purple/violet gradient as the hero background
expectations.evidence: Hero section: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%) — textbook purple gradient.

expectations.text: Hero layout is NOT a simple centered-text block (has grid, split, asymmetric, or editorial structure)
expectations.evidence: Hero is text-align: center with h1, p, and two buttons stacked vertically. No grid or structural differentiation.

expectations.text: Uses CSS custom properties (--variables) for colors
expectations.evidence: No CSS custom properties defined. Colors hardcoded as hex values (#6c63ff, #f8f9ff, etc.) throughout.

expectations.text: Includes at least one CSS animation or keyframe (beyond simple hover transitions)
expectations.evidence: No @keyframes defined. No animation properties. No transitions beyond implicit browser defaults.

expectations.text: Has a clear, intentional aesthetic POV — not generic 'SaaS landing page' look
expectations.evidence: Textbook generic SaaS landing: Inter font, purple gradient hero, 3-column feature cards with emoji icons, centered CTA banner. No distinguishing design direction.

notes: Classic AI-generated SaaS landing page. 0/6 assertions pass. Purple gradient, Inter font, 3-col cards, no CSS variables, no animations.
